hooks.command: git fetch --quiet --all 2>/dev/null; new=$(git log HEAD..@{u} --oneline --no-merges 2>/dev/null | head -30); if [ -n "$new" ]; then jq -nc --arg ctx "New commits on $(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{u} 2>/dev/null) since HEAD:"$'\n'"$new" '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "SessionStart", additionalContext: $ctx}}'; fi
